response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms, fixed income or capital markets domain expertise, and SQL Server/Oracle proficiency — all mandatory requirements. Their background is heavily focused on web, mobile, and DLang/TypeScript ecosystems with no evidence of financial systems development.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated leadership in open-source and DevOps practices
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: No visible C++ or Windows platform experience in last 10+ years
Zero mention of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain
SQL experience listed but no evidence of SQL Server or Oracle usage
